subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the Beloved Who sendeth down unto the hearts that which draweth them unto God, the Lord of all worlds. We have, verily, opened the gates of utterance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک المحبوب الذی یرسل الی القلوب ما یجذبها الی الله رب العالمین قد فتحنا ابواب البیان
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @Greatest Name, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @transcendence; unknowability of God
